creator: marc.recht@outlook.com
text:
Just happened again... Core dump is the same, but this was added this time:

Unread portion of the kernel message buffer:
WARNING ctx->contended failed at /wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/drm-515-kmod/work/drm-kmod-drm_v5.15.118_2/drivers/gpu/drm/drm_mo
deset_lock.c:278
